step_rationale: Plaque rupture-associated miRNA; likely regulates MMP or fibrous-cap stability.
mechanism: miR-324-3p is dysregulated in plaque rupture, potentially regulating extracellular-matrix remodeling.

references.title: RNA-seq identifies circulating miRNAs as potential biomarkers for plaque rupture in patients with ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction.
